text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come up with a strategy for Tosen Jordan to use
in the Hopeful Stakes, but it seems to go over her
head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to switch gears, having her instead get a
feel for the strategy by physically trying it out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After successfully digesting my strategy, she
excitedly proclaims that her next goal is to win
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means she's been studying up on different
races on her own, an indicator of just how
motivated she is.
